subcodes.first_line: Verily, God cherisheth the doers of good, for they, like unto a fortified and steadfast citadel, are ever shielded and preserved [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: والله یحب المحسنین حقا که محسنی و متحصن در حصن حصین لهذا محفوظ و مصونی
subcodes.subjects: @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture
